text.title: Code Execution Sandbox
text.summary: Gemini's Python code execution sandbox runs model-generated code and returns both the code and its output as distinct content parts.

rule.statement: Access executable_code and code_execution_result as separate content parts — iterate response.candidates[0].content.parts and check hasattr for each.
rule.rationale: Code and output are distinct part types; indexing blindly into content returns whichever part happens to be first.

example.code:
model = genai.GenerativeModel( model_name="gemini-1.5-pro", tools=["code_execution"] ) csv_file = genai.upload_file("sales_data.csv")
response = model.generate_content([ "Analyze this sales data. Calculate monthly averages, find top performers, summarize trends.", csv_file ])
example.note: Sandbox has no internet access and ~30s execution limit. Results may be truncated for long-running computations.
